en: Pranksters. Once you get past 12, there are no other numbers.
He continued, I won't sit back and let this cultural sense that it's OK to be bad at maths put children at a disadvantage.
ko: 그가 말했어, 수학 못해도 괜찮다는 문화적 인식이 아이들을 불리하게 만드는 걸 가만히 보고 있지 않겠다고.

en: He has a point. He has a real point.
Now, the report on claims of bullying by Dominic Raab has been handed to Number 10, but they're not going to make a decision on it today.
ko: 자, 도미닉 라브의 갑질 관련 보고서가 총리실에 전달됐지만, 오늘 결정을 내리진 않을 거래요.

en: But we are recording this the day before you see it, so by the time you see it, who knows?
ko: 근데 우리는 여러분이 보기 하루 전에 녹화하고 있어서, 볼 때쯤엔 누가 알겠어요?

en: They don't want to make up what they think is going to happen the next 24 hours.
ko: 앞으로 24시간 동안 무슨 일이 일어날지 지어내고 싶지 않대요.

en: Well, I was going to declare the result of the bullying.
ko: 음, 난 갑질 결과를 발표하려고 했는데.
